name: SAP Signavio Process Intelligence REST API
what_it_does: SAP Signavio Process Intelligence REST API for enterprises to discover, analyze, and optimize business processes — combining process mining, process modeling, and decision management — enabling automated process discovery from event logs, BPMN process model management, conformance checking, process variant analysis, and business process transformation through Signavio's SAP-integrated process intelligence platform. Enables AI agents to manage process discovery for event log analysis and automated process discovery automation, handle process model management for BPMN process model creation and version management automation, access conformance checking for process deviation and compliance analysis automation, retrieve variant analysis for process variant and performance comparison automation, manage decision management for DMN decision table definition and governance automation, handle collaboration management for process model review and approval workflow automation, access simulation for process scenario simulation and optimization automation, retrieve integration for SAP S/4HANA process event log extraction automation, manage workflow automation for process-triggered task and notification automation, and integrate Signavio with SAP systems, ERP, and enterprise applications for process intelligence automation.
use_cases: Discovering actual business process flows from ERP event logs for process mining automation agents
Managing BPMN process models and governance workflows for enterprise BPM automation agents
Analyzing SAP process conformance and deviations for S/4HANA transformation automation agents
Modeling and simulating business process improvements for optimization automation agents
not_for: Small businesses without complex process documentation needs (Signavio is enterprise process intelligence; simpler diagramming tools serve SMB needs)
Real-time operational monitoring (Signavio is process discovery and modeling, not real-time operational dashboards)
Non-SAP process mining implementations (Signavio's strongest value is SAP integration; standalone process miners may work better without SAP)
best_when: A large SAP-centric enterprise wanting AI agents to automate process discovery from SAP event logs, manage BPMN process models, analyze process conformance, and drive business transformation through SAP Signavio's integrated process intelligence platform.
avoid_when: SAP SIGNAVIO REQUIRES SAP ECOSYSTEM: Signavio's process mining is deeply integrated with SAP; automated standalone assumption creates limited_value for process mining in non-SAP environments; automated must be SAP customer for full Signavio value. SAP ENTERPRISE LICENSE REQUIRED: Signavio is part of SAP's enterprise portfolio; automated open-developer assumption creates enterprise_agreement_required; Signavio requires SAP Enterprise subscription; automated must have SAP agreement. EVENT LOG EXTRACTION IS COMPLEX: Process mining requires structured event logs from source systems; automated auto-extract assumption creates poor_process_model for process discovery without quality event log extraction; automated must invest in event log extraction pipeline. BPMN MODELS REQUIRE DOMAIN EXPERTISE: Creating meaningful BPMN models requires business process expertise; automated automated-modeling assumption creates low_quality_model for BPMN created without domain expert input; automated should involve process experts for meaningful model governance.

auth.notes: SAP Signavio uses OAuth2 for Process Intelligence REST API. REST API with JSON. Berlin, Germany HQ. Founded 2009 by Gero Decker, Willi Tscheschner, and Zolta Kis. Acquired by SAP ($1.2B, 2021). Products: Signavio Process Manager (BPM), Signavio Process Intelligence (process mining), Signavio Process Collaboration Hub, Signavio Decision Manager. Integrated into SAP Business Process Intelligence suite. Used by BMW, Kellogg's, British Airways. Competes with Celonis, ABBYY Timeline, and UiPath Process Mining for enterprise process intelligence.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Signavio Process Manager: free trial; Process Intelligence requires SAP enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual SAP enterprise subscription; module-based pricing; Signavio as part of SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform)
pricing.notes: Berlin DE. SAP subsidiary. $1.2B acquisition 2021. SAP enterprise portfolio. BMW, Kellogg's, British Airways users.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; process intelligence APIs throttled per SAP subscription

known_agent_gotchas: WORKSPACE ID IS REQUIRED: Signavio operations are scoped to workspace; automated single-workspace assumption creates workspace_not_found for multi-workspace deployments not specifying correct workspace ID; automated must retrieve and use correct workspace ID for all operations

BPMN EXPORT FORMAT VARIES: Process model export supports BPMN 2.0 XML, JSON, and SVG; automated single-format assumption creates unsupported_format for export requests using format not supported for the operation type; automated must specify correct export format per use case

PROCESS MINING CASES ARE EVENT-BASED: Process intelligence requires event log data structured as cases with events and timestamps; automated unstructured-data assumption creates poor_process_discovery for event logs without proper case ID, activity, and timestamp structure; automated must ensure event log structure compliance

COLLABORATION REQUIRES USER LICENSES: Signavio collaboration features require user licenses; automated unlimited-users assumption creates license_exceeded for collaboration operations beyond licensed user count; automated must manage user license allocation

SAP INTEGRATION USES SEPARATE CONNECTOR: SAP data extraction for process mining uses Signavio Process Intelligence Connector for SAP; automated direct-api assumption creates missing_sap_data for process mining without configured SAP connector; automated must configure Signavio SAP connector for SAP event log extraction
agent_readiness.security_notes: Process intelligence. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. EU/US. Business process model and event log data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Process intelligence. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US. Process model and event log data.
